description: Style Note To all fashion forward guys - your search is over! Jack & Jones is here, just waiting to provide you with all the stylish gear you need to create your own JJ look. This is one brand who know all about denim - especially how to get the right Fit that will turn all the girls' heads! If you don't want to have to work hard to look great, then put yourself in Jack and Jones' capable hands.. they're there to guarantee you'll turn heads for all the right reasons! Product Details Blue washed jeans, has a buttoned and zippered closure, belt loops at the waist, brand patch at the back on the waistband, has two insert pockets in front with coin pocket inside right pocket and 2 patch pockets at the back with stitched detail Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash Do not bleach Tumble dry low Use cool iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and waist 32") is wearing a size 32/34For Jack & Jones jeans sizes, first number refers to waist and second number refers to inseam length
